  • Uses of CartResponse in com.example.restapi.service

    Methods in com.example.restapi.service that return CartResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CartResponse
    CartService.addItemToCart(UUID ownerId, Long itemId, Integer quantity)
    Adds an item to the user's cart.
    CartResponse
    CartService.clearCart(UUID ownerId)
    Empties the user's cart.
    CartResponse
    CartService.getCart(UUID ownerId)
    Returns the current state of a user's cart.
    CartResponse
    CartService.removeItemFromCart(UUID ownerId, Long itemId)
    Removes an item line from the user's cart.
